blocks.content: Mr. Alvarez was watching him with the patience of someone who had decided this conversation had more in it.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Alvarez
blocks.content: You are not a man who lets things in easily.

blocks.speaker: Ethan
blocks.content: I learned a long time ago that if you don't invest, you don't lose. It felt like a reasonable arrangement.

blocks.speaker: Ethan
blocks.content: Now it feels like the wrong word.
Mr. Alvarez finished his cup and stood, unhurried, the way he did everything.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Alvarez
blocks.content: A reasonable arrangement protects you from loss. But it also means nothing can come in. You cannot only open the door halfway.
He went back behind the counter. After a moment:

blocks.speaker: Mr. Alvarez
blocks.content: Open your sketchbook, Ethan. She'll come.
